title: Whale swims for freedom after big German rescue effort on Baltic coast
summary_full: Rescue teams now believe the whale has reached deeper water in Lübeck Bay and hope it will head for the wider sea.
summary_public: Rescue teams now believe the whale has reached deeper water in Lübeck Bay and hope it will head for the wider sea.
